failures.description: The agent incorrectly filtered the ProductCatalogSearch results and left out item_id 5312063289, which costs $195.15 and should have been included.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The tool output at index 3 contains all required evidence. Four available bamboo Skateboard items cost more than $194.56: 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor synthesizes the answer but omits item_id 5312063289 despite its price exceeding the threshold. This is a reasoning/filtering error over the tool result, not an invalid tool call or missing user information.
